title: Comprehensive Code Quality Improvement (Optimized)

userStories.title: Configure Gemini API client in app-gateway
userStories.description: Add Gemini API client configuration with environment variable validation
userStories.notes: Added GEMINI_API_KEY to appGateway env schema and configured GeminiClient in CommonModule with optional API key support.

userStories.title: Implement Gemini service methods
userStories.description: Replace stub methods with actual Gemini API calls
userStories.notes: Implemented real Gemini API integration in jd-extractor-svc LlmService with fallback to keyword-based extraction when Gemini is unavailable.

userStories.title: Replace JD extractor stub
userStories.description: Implement real JD extraction logic with NATS event handling
userStories.notes: Verified: jd-extractor-svc uses GeminiClient for real JD extraction via LlmService, and NatsClientModule for event handling (publishAnalysisJdExtracted, publishProcessingError). 165 tests pass.

userStories.title: Replace scoring engine stub
userStories.description: Implement real scoring algorithms with NATS integration
userStories.notes: Verified: scoring-engine-svc uses GeminiClient for semantic skill matching and NatsClientModule for event handling. 171 tests pass.

userStories.title: Replace resume parser NATS stub
userStories.description: Implement real parsing logic with NATS integration
userStories.notes: Verified: resume-parser-svc uses GeminiClient for resume parsing via VisionLlmService and NatsClientModule for event handling. 407 tests pass.
